use_cases: Collecting text input in forms for user registration, login, or settings
Implementing search fields with clean UI that removes default browser styling
Creating styled file upload inputs with proper accessibility
Building accessible form components with focus ring indicators for keyboard navigation
ai_summary: A versatile text input component supporting standard, search, and file input types. Features modern styling with rounded corners, subtle shadows, focus ring accessibility indicators, and proper disabled states. Built with React forwardRef pattern for flexible form integration.
